message:
fix(clippy): suppress 2 false-positive warnings in asupersync feature path

Add #[allow] annotations for clippy lints that fire only with
subprocess-bridge+asupersync-runtime features:
- cx.rs: result_large_err on CxRuntimeBuilder::build() (asupersync::Error is external)
- replay.rs: needless_pass_by_ref_mut on check_control (&mut needed by tokio path)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
